zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_Begin_1: $self$没有躲闪，放松腹部肌肉任由$target$的手掌贴上来。"别乱挠哦，我很怕痒的。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_Begin_2: $self$顺势后仰，露出毫无防备的小腹，嘴角含笑。"想在那里取暖吗？真是孩子气呢。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_Begin_3: $self$轻按住$target$放在自己肚子上的手，没有移开的意思。"刚吃饱不久，动作温柔点。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_Begin_4: $self$低头注视那只手，眼中流露出一丝安心。"嗯……这种触感还不赖。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_Begin_5: $self$沉默不语，只是配合着$target$的动作调整呼吸节奏，身体显得格外柔软。
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_Begin_6: $self$主动掀起衣摆，大方地展示出肌肤。"仅限两分钟哦？"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_Begin_2_2_1_1: $self$身体明显僵硬了一下，错愕地说道。"呃？这、这是什么新式打招呼吗？"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_Begin_2_2_1_2: $self$愣在原地，视线在$target$的手和脸之间游移，一时忘了反应。"那个……您在做什么？"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_Begin_2_2_1_3: $self$虽感意外却未推开，困惑地眨眨眼。"如果是检查身体的话……请快一点。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_Begin_2_2_1_4: $self$紧张地屏住呼吸，双手无处安放。"如果不疼的话……倒是没关系……"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_Begin_2_2_1_5: $self$迟疑地看着$target$，似乎在揣测意图。"这就是所谓的……治疗吗？"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_Begin_2_2_2_1: $self$浑身颤抖，死死咬住下唇不敢出声。"……我知道了，请不要伤害我。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_Begin_2_2_2_2: $self$紧闭双眼，身体紧绷如石，任由那只手在腹部游走。"只要……只要这样就行了吗？"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_Begin_2_2_2_3: $self$脸色苍白眼神空洞，双手紧抓身下布料。"……随意吧。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_Begin_2_2_2_4: $self$发出一声短促惊呼，随即捂住嘴惊恐地看向$target$。"对不起……我不会反抗的。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_Begin_2_2_2_5: $self$像是放弃挣扎般垂下头，身体因恐惧随动作细微抽搐。"……请轻一点。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_3_2_1: $self$发出含糊呓语，下意识想翻身躲避腹部异样感，却被按住。
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_3_2_2: $self$眉头微皱，但在手掌温暖抚慰下很快舒展，呼吸转为平稳。
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_3_2_3: $self$迷糊地伸出手，像赶苍蝇般挥了一下，随即又沉沉睡去。
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_3_2_4: $self$似乎把手当成抱枕的一部分，主动抱住蹭了蹭，嘴里嘟囔着。
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_3_2_5: $self$受刺激身体本能缩了一下，随后发出沉重呼吸声，依然未醒。
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_3_2_6: $self$全无察觉，只是随着腹部被按压的节奏，喉间发出轻微呼噜声。
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_3_1_1: $self$静止原地，唯有腹部肌肤随$target$手指按压而凹陷，无生理回弹。
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_3_1_2: $self$保持上一秒姿势，完全不知有一只手正在她皮肤上肆意游走。
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_3_1_3: $self$表情凝固在微笑瞬间，对小腹传来的触感温度毫无知觉。
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_3_1_4: $self$腹部软肉被随意揉捏成各种形状，宛如一块静止的柔软粘土。
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_3_1_5: $self$毫无反应地承受一切，仅皮肤因摩擦微红，无任何神经信号反馈。
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_3_1_6: $self$连呼吸都被冻结，手掌在她腹部的抚摸如同幽灵穿过静止雕塑。
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_1_2_1: $self$触电般缩身，笑着拍掉$target$的手。"呀！好痒！别碰那里！"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_1_2_2: $self$捂着肚子退后半步，带着戏谑的警惕。"你手太凉了！绝对不行！"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_1_2_3: $self$抓住$target$手腕，坚定摇头。"刚吃完饭肚子不舒服，别闹。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_1_2_4: $self$难为情地侧身避开接触。"这里……最近胖了一点，不想被碰。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_1_2_5: $self$叹气，把$target$的手拿开并塞个抱枕过去。"摸这个吧，手感差不多。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_3_1: $self$礼貌而坚定地挡住$target$的手，挂着职业化微笑。"请注意您的手，这个部位不太合适。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_3_2: $self$不动声色后退一步，拉开安全距离。"不好意思，我不习惯这么亲近。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_3_3: $self$尴尬地抓抓头发，侧身避过。"那个，能不能别碰肚子？感觉怪怪的。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_3_4: $self$伸手轻轻架住$target$手臂。"虽不想扫兴，但这有点越过我的舒适圈了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_3_5: $self$用玩笑语气化解尴尬。"哎呀，肚子上全是肉，可没什么好摸的。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_4_1: $self$猛地拍掉伸来的手，眼神瞬间转冷。"你想干什么？离我远点！"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_4_2: $self$厌恶皱眉，迅速倒退并做出防御姿态。"别用你的脏手碰我！"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_4_3: $self$响亮咋舌，毫不掩饰眼中鄙夷。"谁允许你碰这里的？真恶心。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_4_4: $self$冰冷盯着$target$，语气充满警告。"再往前伸一寸，我就报警了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_4_5: $self$正眼都不看$target$，嫌弃地拍打刚才被碰的衣服位置。"下次注意点分寸。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_1_3_1: $self$呼吸变得绵长，整个人像猫一样蜷缩起来。"嗯……意外地很舒服，手掌热热的……"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_1_3_2: $self$半眯眼睛，发出一声轻哼。"你的按摩技术什么时候变得这么好了？"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_1_3_3: $self$把手覆在$target$手背上引导动作。"再往旁边一点……对，就是那里。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_1_3_4: $self$脸上泛起淡红，声音变得黏糊。"稍微……有点困了。继续这样也没关系。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_1_3_5: $self$发出一声满足叹息，完全放松警惕。"感觉胃暖暖的，真神奇。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_5_1: $self$原本紧绷的肩膀渐松，眼神戒备消散。"……不得不承认，你的手法很专业。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_5_2: $self$意外地低头看，似不再排斥接触。"原来不是恶作剧吗？抱歉刚才误会你了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_5_3: $self$长出一口气，神情变得柔和。"这种热度……倒是正好缓解了我的胃痛。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_5_4: $self$不好意思地别过头，声音变小。"稍微……没那么讨厌了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_5_5: $self$不知不觉适应了这个距离。"如果不乱动的话，再放一会儿也可以。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_1_4_1: $self$没忍住笑场，扭动身体躲开手。"不行不行！太痒了，受不了了！"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_1_4_2: $self$僵硬地坐直身子，轻轻推开$target$。"好了……一直摸这里感觉怪怪的。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_1_4_3: $self$皱眉，似感到一丝不适。"是不是按得太重了？有点疼。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_1_4_4: $self$尴尬清嗓子，把衣服拉下来。"那个……时间太长了吧？有点难为情。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_1_4_5: $self$抓住$target$乱动的手指，语气严肃。"越界了哦。只是摸摸的话已经够了吧。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_6_1: $self$忍无可忍挥开$target$的手，呼吸急促。"够了！你是变态吗？还要摸多久！"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_6_2: $self$浑身不适感达顶点，脸色极难看。"不仅没有变好，反而更让人火大了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_6_3: $self$强忍反胃感，迅速整理衣服退开。"我真是疯了才会让你继续。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_6_4: $self$厌恶溢出，冷冷瞪着$target$。"现在的流氓都这么有耐心吗？滚开。"
zh-cn.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_6_5: $self$咬牙切齿低语，身体因愤怒轻颤。"利用别人的容忍度也是有限度的……"

en-us.com_touch_abdomen_Begin_1: $self$ doesn't shy away, relaxing her abdominal muscles as $target$'s palm rests against her. "Don't tickle me, I'm very ticklish."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_Begin_2: $self$ leans back, exposing her defenseless lower abdomen with a smile. "Trying to warm your hands there? How childish."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_Begin_3: $self$ gently holds $target$'s hand on her belly, not intending to move it. "I just ate, so be gentle."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_Begin_4: $self$ looks down at the hand, a look of reassurance in her eyes. "Hmm... this actually feels nice."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_Begin_5: $self$ says nothing, simply adjusting her breathing to $target$'s movements, her body remaining pliant.
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_Begin_6: $self$ actively lifts the hem of her clothes, generously revealing her skin. "Only for two minutes, okay?"
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_Begin_2_2_1_1: $self$ stiffens visibly, looking bewildered. "Uh? Is... is this some new way of greeting?"
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_Begin_2_2_1_2: $self$ freezes, eyes darting between $target$'s hand and face, forgetting to react. "Um... what are you doing?"
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_Begin_2_2_1_3: $self$ is surprised but doesn't push away, blinking in confusion. "If this is a physical checkup... please make it quick."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_Begin_2_2_1_4: $self$ holds her breath nervously, not knowing where to put her hands. "As long as it doesn't hurt... I guess it's okay..."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_Begin_2_2_1_5: $self$ looks at $target$ hesitantly, trying to gauge intentions. "Is this what you call... treatment?"
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_Begin_2_2_2_1: $self$ trembles all over, biting her lower lip to stay silent. "...I understand, please don't hurt me."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_Begin_2_2_2_2: $self$ squeezes her eyes shut, body tense as a rock, letting the hand roam her stomach. "Is... is this all you're going to do?"
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_Begin_2_2_2_3: $self$ goes pale, staring blankly away, hands clutching the fabric beneath her. "...Do as you please."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_Begin_2_2_2_4: $self$ lets out a short gasp, immediately covering her mouth and looking at $target$ in fear. "I'm sorry... I won't resist."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_Begin_2_2_2_5: $self$ hangs her head as if giving up, body twitching slightly with fear at $target$'s movements. "...Please be gentle."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_3_2_1: $self$ mumbles incoherently, instinctively trying to turn away from the sensation on her belly but is held down.
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_3_2_2: $self$ frowns slightly, but quickly relaxes under the warmth of the palm, breathing steadying.
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_3_2_3: $self$ groggily swats her hand like shooing a fly, then falls back into deep sleep.
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_3_2_4: $self$ seems to mistake the hand for a pillow, hugging it and nuzzling against it, muttering something.
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_3_2_5: $self$ flinches at the stimulus, then breathes heavily, still fast asleep.
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_3_2_6: $self$ is completely unaware, a soft purring sound coming from her throat in rhythm with the pressure on her abdomen.
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_3_1_1: $self$ stands frozen, the skin of her abdomen depressing under $target$'s fingers with no physiological rebound.
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_3_1_2: $self$ remains in her previous pose, completely unaware of a hand roaming freely over her skin.
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_3_1_3: $self$'s expression is frozen in a smile, oblivious to the touch and warmth on her lower belly.
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_3_1_4: $self$'s soft belly flesh is molded into shapes like still, soft clay.
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_3_1_5: $self$ endures it all without reaction, skin reddening from friction but sending no neural signals.
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_3_1_6: $self$'s breath is frozen; the hand stroking her belly is like a ghost passing through a statue.
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_1_2_1: $self$ flinches like she's been shocked, laughing as she slaps $target$'s hand away. "Eek! That tickles! Don't touch there!"
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_1_2_2: $self$ covers her stomach and steps back, playfully wary. "Your hands are too cold! Absolutely not!"
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_1_2_3: $self$ grabs $target$'s wrist, shaking her head firmly. "I just ate and my stomach feels weird, stop it."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_1_2_4: $self$ turns sideways shyly to avoid contact. "I... gained a little weight there recently, I don't want it touched."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_1_2_5: $self$ sighs, removing $target$'s hand and shoving a pillow at them. "Touch this instead, it feels about the same."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_3_1: $self$ politely but firmly blocks $target$'s hand, wearing a professional smile. "Please mind your hands, that area isn't appropriate."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_3_2: $self$ steps back discreetly, creating a safe distance. "Sorry, I'm not used to being this close to people."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_3_3: $self$ scratches her hair awkwardly, sidestepping. "Um, could you not touch my stomach? It feels weird."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_3_4: $self$ gently intercepts $target$'s arm. "Not to be a buzzkill, but this is crossing my comfort zone."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_3_5: $self$ defuses the awkwardness with a joke. "Oh my, it's all fat on my belly, nothing good to feel there."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_4_1: $self$ slaps the hand away sharply, eyes turning cold instantly. "What do you think you're doing? Get away from me!"
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_4_2: $self$ frowns in disgust, backing away quickly into a defensive stance. "Don't touch me with your dirty hands!"
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_4_3: $self$ clicks her tongue loudly, making no secret of her disdain. "Who gave you permission to touch there? Disgusting."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_4_4: $self$ stares coldly at $target$, tone full of warning. "Reach one inch closer and I'm calling the police."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_4_5: $self$ doesn't even look at $target$, disgustedly dusting off the spot on her clothes that was touched. "Watch yourself next time."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_1_3_1: $self$'s breathing lengthens, curling up like a cat. "Mmm... that's surprisingly comfortable, your hand is warm..."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_1_3_2: $self$ half-closes her eyes, letting out a soft hum. "Since when did your massage skills get this good?"
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_1_3_3: $self$ places her hand over $target$'s to guide the movement. "A little to the side... yes, right there."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_1_3_4: $self$ blushes slightly, voice becoming sticky. "I'm getting... a little sleepy. It's okay to keep going."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_1_3_5: $self$ sighs with satisfaction, completely lowering her guard. "My stomach feels warm, it's magical."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_5_1: $self$'s previously tense shoulders relax, wariness fading from her eyes. "...I have to admit, your technique is professional."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_5_2: $self$ looks down in surprise, seemingly no longer rejecting the contact. "So it wasn't a prank? Sorry for misunderstanding."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_5_3: $self$ exhales deeply, expression softening. "This heat... actually helps my stomachache."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_5_4: $self$ turns her head away shyly, voice quiet. "It's... not as annoying as I thought."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_5_5: $self$ unknowingly adapts to the distance. "If you don't try anything funny, you can keep it there a while longer."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_1_4_1: $self$ bursts out laughing, twisting away from the hand. "No, no! It tickles too much, I can't take it!"
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_1_4_2: $self$ sits up stiffly, gently pushing $target$ away. "Okay... touching there for so long feels weird."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_1_4_3: $self$ frowns, seeming to feel a twinge of discomfort. "Are you pressing too hard? It hurts a little."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_1_4_4: $self$ clears her throat awkwardly, pulling her clothes down. "Um... hasn't it been too long? It's embarrassing."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_1_4_5: $self$ grabs $target$'s wandering fingers, tone serious. "You're crossing the line. Just touching is enough, right?"
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_6_1: $self$ slaps $target$'s hand away, patience exhausted, breathing fast. "Enough! Are you a pervert? How long are you going to keep touching!"
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_6_2: $self$ reaches peak discomfort, looking very unwell. "It's not getting better, it's just pissing me off."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_6_3: $self$ suppresses the urge to vomit, quickly fixing her clothes and backing off. "I must be crazy to let you continue."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_6_4: $self$ overflows with disgust, glaring coldly at $target$. "Are perverts these days so patient? Get lost."
en-us.com_touch_abdomen_2_2_6_5: $self$ whispers through gritted teeth, body trembling with anger. "There's a limit to taking advantage of someone's tolerance..."
